creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014
New Revision: 340144
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/340144
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r340144/

Log:
  - Update from 0.04 to 0.05
  - Convert USE_GMAKE to USES
  - Add stage support
  
  while here
  - Add a patch to install the files as user (remove -o and -g parameters from install)
  
  PR:		ports/185700
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Added:
  head/misc/sssnips/files/patch-Makefile   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/misc/sssnips/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/sssnips/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/misc/sssnips/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/sssnips/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:47:18 2014	(r340143)
+++ head/misc/sssnips/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014	(r340144)
@@ -2,24 +2,30 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	sssnips
-PORTVERSION=	0.04
+PORTVERSION=	0.05
 CATEGORIES=	misc
-MASTER_SITES=	http://devel.ringlet.net/misc/sssnips/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://devel.ringlet.net/files/misc/sssnips/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Shell script snippets written by Peter Pentchev
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD2CLAUSE
 
-PROGRAMS=	bigfile declean getkey hostsearch mkv noagent qidiff qpr \
-		signfiles stun switch-link syspower vcr vcrtty ws
-PLIST_FILES=	${PROGRAMS:S@^@bin/@}
-MAN1=		${PROGRAMS:S/$/.1/}
-MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
+USE_XZ=		yes
+USES=		gmake
+MAKE_ENV=	BINGRP=wheel MANDIR=${MANPREFIX}/man/man
+
+PLIST_FILES=	${PROGRAMS:S@^@bin/@} \
+		${PROGRAMS:S@^@man/man1/@:S@$@.1.gz@}
+
+PROGRAMS=	bigfile csort declean getkey git-ss git-ssnoq git-ssq \
+		hostsearch mkv noagent qidiff qpr resock signfiles stun \
+		switch-link syspower vcr vcrtty ws
+
+post-patch:
+.for i in vcr.1 vcr.sh
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|%%PREFIX%%|${PREFIX}|' ${WRKSRC}/${i}
+.endfor
 
-USE_GMAKE=	1
-
-MAKE_ENV+=	BINGRP=wheel MANDIR=${PREFIX}/man/man
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/misc/sssnips/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/sssnips/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:47:18 2014	(r340143)
+++ head/misc/sssnips/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014	(r340144)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (sssnips-0.04.tar.gz) = 0bcaef6bd7e0c89b1c6acb0ce8291870ca3372bad5a6f9bf47c429d26bb4cf8f
-SIZE (sssnips-0.04.tar.gz) = 15255
+SHA256 (sssnips-0.05.tar.xz) = 9ab6872decaa64f87d1a584ccd3ea25de75471dbf7a5e0e5908e1720d1719bfd
+SIZE (sssnips-0.05.tar.xz) = 15216

Added: head/misc/sssnips/files/patch-Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/misc/sssnips/files/patch-Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014	(r340144)
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+--- ./Makefile.orig	2014-01-18 00:23:54.000000000 -0200
++++ ./Makefile	2014-01-18 00:24:44.000000000 -0200
+@@ -72,9 +72,9 @@
+ 
+ COPY?=		-c
+ STRIP?=		-s
+-INSTALL_PROGRAM?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} ${STRIP} -o ${BINOWN} -g ${BINGRP} -m ${BINMODE}
+-INSTALL_SCRIPT?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} -o ${BINOWN} -g ${BINGRP} -m ${BINMODE}
+-INSTALL_DATA?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} -o ${SHAREOWN} -g ${SHAREGRP} -m ${SHAREMODE}
++INSTALL_PROGRAM?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} ${STRIP} -m ${BINMODE}
++INSTALL_SCRIPT?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} -m ${BINMODE}
++INSTALL_DATA?=	${INSTALL} ${COPY} -m ${SHAREMODE}
+ 
+ all:		${SCRIPTS} ${MAN1}
+
